The '''Jinsu Razor''' was a unique [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] [[Lightsaber hilt/Legends|hilt]], one which was made by the [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Aralina Silk]], who died in [[Restuss]]. It is believed her Jinsu Razor hilt was taken by one of the attackers, who then presented it to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Antaria Wellos]].
{{Weapon-stub}}
